ksa_text: Knowledge of data domain ownership and stewardship models, including domain boundary definition, accountability assignment, and cross-domain governance dispute resolution.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA DG-K-008 (DG, Knowledge) maps to Digital Evaluator scope as moderate fit. Composite score 0.4447 clears the moderate fit threshold of 0.43. Top framework anchors: nice=0.445, dcwf=0.428, ddat=0.427. Seniority fit: appropriate; content reflects IC-to-senior-IC execution work within digital program evaluation, performance analytics, and evidence-based assessment.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 include upheld. Score 0.4447 for moderate fit domain is consistent with ANL IC-level scope. No internal contradictions identified.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does KSA DG-K-008 (DG, composite 0.4447) appear in published data analyst / BI role profiles and workforce frameworks?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Survey of DAMA DMBOK governance competencies; governance awareness at practitioner level appears in O*NET 15-2051 expanded skill sets does not surface this DG-domain content as a core or common requirement for IC-to-senior-IC data analyst roles. Score 0.4447 may reflect incidental framework overlap. Without direct analytics-domain text confirmation, external ground truth does not support inclusion at this signal level.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 include overturned. Insufficient external evidence for DG domain content at composite 0.4447 without confirming text signals. Revised to exclude.

decision_rationale: Single adversarial overturn by P4 external ground truth. Final decision: exclude. Composite 0.4447, domain DG. Medium confidence — one agent challenged and overturned the preliminary assessment.
